headline: Large BTC transfer to Binance detected by on-chain tracker
summary_text: Social media signals indicate a transfer of approximately 1,500 BTC ($183M) from an unknown wallet to Binance, according to Whale Alert on X.
alert_reason: T4 source with reduced confidence; severity within crypto T4 cap (60) but below alert thresholds.
source_confidence_note: Low confidence: sole source is a T4 social signal (X account). Confidence reduced by 20 points per trust rules. Wording hedged.

headline: X search signals suggest BTC breakout chatter rising
summary_text: Unconfirmed reports suggest growing social media discussion around a potential Bitcoin breakout above $120K, based on X keyword search signals.
alert_reason: T4 keyword search with very low confidence; below all alert thresholds. Noise signal.
source_confidence_note: Very low confidence: X keyword search (T4) is the sole source. No corroboration from T1-T3 sources. Confidence reduced by 20+ points.

headline: Large BTC transfer confirmed as institutional activity by Reuters
summary_text: Reuters reports that a large Bitcoin transfer detected earlier was part of institutional rebalancing activity, confirming social media signals from Whale Alert.
alert_reason: T2 wire source confirms T4 signal — confidence upgraded. Institutional BTC movement is relevant to crypto audience.
source_confidence_note: High confidence: T2 wire source (Reuters) independently confirms initial T4 signal (Whale Alert X). Confidence boosted by +25 points per T4-to-T2 confirmation rule.
